response.original_title: Витька Вор и дядька его Егор
response.overview: Vitka made a promise not to steal anymore. But what a promise is for a young thief recently released from prison is an empty place. With Uncle Egor, he goes to the city to sell his mother's jewelry. And immediately breaks the promise. A little later, Uncle Egor becomes a victim himself — jewelry is stolen from him on the platform. Vitka decides to help his uncle not to be left "with a nose."
response.title: Витька Вор и дядька его Егор
